# Release 3 Screenshots

This folder is reserved for Release 3 evidence in the `azawslab Enterprise Hybrid Security Platform`.

Release 3 focuses on secure workload modernization, containerization, protected ingress, workload observability, and resilience.

## Planned evidence areas

- reference application
- Docker modernization
- secure hosting
- ingress and WAF
- connectivity
- observability
- resilience

## Status

Release 3 is planned. Evidence will be added here as implementation progresses.
